name: cadence-deslop
description: Deterministic AI-slop detector for prose. Scores any text 0–100 and names every AI tell — uniform rhythm, hollow-confidence words, reflexive triads, negation pivots, cliché openers. Zero dependencies. The detector behind the Cadence writing plugin.

scripts.check:docs: node skills/cadence/scripts/deslop.mjs --prose-only --max 10 README.md && node skills/cadence/scripts/deslop.mjs --prose-only --max 10 CONTRIBUTING.md && node skills/cadence/scripts/deslop.mjs --prose-only --max 15 PHILOSOPHY.md && node skills/cadence/scripts/deslop.mjs --prose-only --max 10 CHANGELOG.md

author: Isabel Wu
